'''鈭歞-h-ng''' ('''kadahang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbank|unbank]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbank|unbank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-h-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kadahang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidahang|thidahang]] || [[word:jidahang|jidahang]] || [[word:shidahang|shidahang]] || [[word:kidahang|kidahang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudahang|thuthudahang]] || [[word:jujudahang|jujudahang]] || [[word:shushudahang|shushudahang]] || [[word:kukudahang|kukudahang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudahang|thudahang]] || [[word:judahang|judahang]] || [[word:shudahang|shudahang]] || [[word:kudahang|kudahang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudahang|thudahang]] || [[word:judahang|judahang]] || [[word:shudahang|shudahang]] || [[word:kudahang|kudahang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedahang|thedahang]] || [[word:jedahang|jedahang]] || [[word:shedahang|shedahang]] || [[word:kedahang|kedahang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodahang|thothodahang]] || [[word:jojodahang|jojodahang]] || [[word:shoshodahang|shoshodahang]] || [[word:kokodahang|kokodahang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodahang|thodahang]] || [[word:jodahang|jodahang]] || [[word:shodahang|shodahang]] || [[word:kodahang|kodahang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodahang|thodahang]] || [[word:jodahang|jodahang]] || [[word:shodahang|shodahang]] || [[word:kodahang|kodahang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]] || [[word:dahang|dahang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dahang|th忙dahang]] || [[word:j忙dahang|j忙dahang]] || [[word:sh忙dahang|sh忙dahang]] || [[word:k忙dahang|k忙dahang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadahang|thathadahang]] || [[word:jajadahang|jajadahang]] || [[word:shashadahang|shashadahang]] || [[word:kakadahang|kakadahang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadahang|thadahang]] || [[word:jadahang|jadahang]] || [[word:shadahang|shadahang]] || [[word:kadahang|kadahang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadahang|thadahang]] || [[word:jadahang|jadahang]] || [[word:shadahang|shadahang]] || [[word:kadahang|kadahang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadahang|shadahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadahang|goshadahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadahang|gokishadahang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadahangn眉|shadahangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadahangnkn眉|goshadahangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahangn眉|gokishadahangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadahangsh毛|shadahangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadahangnksh毛|goshadahangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadahangsh毛|gokishadahangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahangro|shadahangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahangnkro|goshadahangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahangro|gokishadahangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahangmu|shadahangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahangnkmu|goshadahangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahangmu|gokishadahangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadahangsher|shadahangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadahangnksher|goshadahangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadahangsher|gokishadahangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadahangng|shadahangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadahangnkng|goshadahangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadahangng|gokishadahangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadahangya|shadahangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadahangnkya|goshadahangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadahangya|gokishadahangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadahangyam|shadahangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadahangnkyam|goshadahangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadahangyam|gokishadahangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahangn眉sh毛|shadahangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahangnkn眉sh毛|goshadahangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahangn眉sh毛|gokishadahangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahangn眉ro|shadahangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahangnkn眉ro|goshadahangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahangn眉ro|gokishadahangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahangn眉mu|shadahangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahangnkn眉mu|goshadahangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahangn眉mu|gokishadahangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahangsh毛n眉|shadahangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahangnksh毛n眉|goshadahangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahangsh毛n眉|gokishadahangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahangsh毛ro|shadahangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahangnksh毛ro|goshadahangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahangsh毛ro|gokishadahangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahangsh毛mu|shadahangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahangnksh毛mu|goshadahangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahangsh毛mu|gokishadahangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahangron眉|shadahangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahangnkron眉|goshadahangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahangron眉|gokishadahangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahangrosh毛|shadahangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahangnkrosh毛|goshadahangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahangrosh毛|gokishadahangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahangromu|shadahangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahangnkromu|goshadahangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahangromu|gokishadahangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahangmun眉|shadahangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahangnkmun眉|goshadahangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahangmun眉|gokishadahangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahangmush毛|shadahangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahangnkmush毛|goshadahangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahangmush毛|gokishadahangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahangmuro|shadahangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahangnkmuro|goshadahangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahangmuro|gokishadahangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
